response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at Naver, which aligns with parts of the role. However, the resume lacks demonstrated depth in production GenAI systems, RAG architectures, vector databases, or cloud-native AI design — the core technical pillars of this Staff FDE position. Customer-facing technical leadership experience is also not evident.
strengths: Recent MCP and agentic workflow tooling work at Naver
13+ years of polyglot full-stack and infrastructure experience
Strong engineering-excellence background (TDD, CI/CD, workshops, mentoring)
concerns: No demonstrated RAG, vector DB, or LLM evaluation/observability experience
Limited evidence of cloud-platform AI system design (AWS/GCP/Azure)
No clear customer-facing or forward-deployed technical leadership history
